title: Schema
purpose: `data/schema.vitl` is a public stdlib surface inside the `data` family. It should be read as one focused slice of the broader family responsibility: Dataset-oriented helpers such as schema, transform, merge, cleaning, and statistics.
use_cases: A telemetry report can be cleaned, merged, transformed, and summarized before export.
A schema page should explain what a valid record looks like before code samples start.
